provenance: Maps measured structural component scores to RELATIVE retention estimates. These are NOT outcome-calibrated predictions of real-world performance — they are bounded functions of signals measured from the user's own clip. The predictor switches to 'calibrated' mode only when outcome-labeled EditEvents exist in data/creator-intelligence/edits. Absolute percentages must be displayed with the 'structural estimate (not calibrated)' qualifier.

completion.note: Higher with a fast hook, dense pacing and good retention structure; penalized as duration approaches/exceeds the 60s cap.

averageWatchTime.note: Estimated seconds watched = estimated completion fraction times the clip length.

rewatchRate.note: Rewatch tracks ending payoff and surprise density.

confidence.note: Estimate confidence reflects how many underlying signals were actually measured (e.g. audio analysis present) and how much material the clip provided. Low signal availability -> low confidence, never a high-confidence guess.
